summary: Joe Reis introduces a new weekend newsletter format called 'The Weekend Windup' designed to share curated reading recommendations and upcoming events. He acknowledges that weekend newsletters are challenging given limited reader attention, so he's keeping the format brief with short rants and curated links.
key_points: Launching a new weekend newsletter series for curated content and events
Format designed to respect readers' limited weekend attention
This week's theme focuses on how people are misapplying AI
Promoting upcoming Coalesce networking events in SF, Atlanta, and Phoenix
Hosting a discussion on data products for modern architectures
money_quotes: Weekend newsletters are hard. You have things to do, and your attention is very limited. I want to respect that.
This week is frankly about how people are f*cking AI up. I say that in this specific order because we're getting ahead of our skis with where AI is right now.
That said, I love AI, and want to support my friends pushing the field forward.
key_insight: The tech industry is rushing ahead with AI implementations faster than the technology warrants, and we need more practical, grounded perspectives on its current capabilities.
